revision.text:
[[ja:広瀬神社 (三島市)]] {{Expand Japanese|広瀬神社 (三島市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hirose Shrine | native_name = 広瀬神社 (三島市) | image = Hirose-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hirose Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.122611|138.911833}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hirose Shrine'''|広瀬神社 (三島市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shi-no-Miya|lt=Shi-no-Miya|qid=Q134917307|1=Shi-no-Miya}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|lt=Shikinai Successor|qid=Q135022918|1=Shikinai Successor}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|ja|伊豆国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q653478|ltq=Q653478|qid=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.122611|138.911833}} == image (P18) == * Hirose-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Hiroseno Shrine|lt=Hiroseno Shrine|qid=Q135039671|1=Hiroseno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県三島市一番町19-3', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:広瀬神社 (三島市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134925373}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Hirose Shrine |Image = [[File:Hirose-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
Shrine building
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|7|21.4|N|138|54|42.6|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|qid=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Ichibancho 19-3 |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|7|21.4|N|138|54|42.6|E|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = Unknown |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (disputed), {{ill|lt=Izu Province|Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} {{ill|lt=Shinomiya|Q11419852|qid=Q11419852|1=Shinomiya}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage designation = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Hirose Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|7|21.4|N|138|54|42.6|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Hirose Shrine''' (ひろせじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located within {{ill|lt=Rakujuen|Q11541603|qid=Q11541603|1=Rakuju-en}} in {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|qid=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. === Overview === The shrine is situated just south of {{ill|lt=Mishima Station|Q375061|qid=Q375061|1=Mishima Station}}, in the southern part of {{ill|lt=Rakujuen|Q11541603|qid=Q11541603|1=Rakuju-en}}. It stands in the eastern section of “Miyajima,” a small island in Kohama Pond (Kohama-ike), where a small sanctuary was rebuilt and enshrined. Hirose Shrine is considered a disputed candidate for a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and it is also identified with “Jūichii Hirose Myōjin” listed in the {{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}. However, it is often explained that when {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|qid=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} was relocated northward to its current site, coinciding with the transfer of the provincial capital in ancient times, this shrine was founded as a branch shrine and distant worship site of {{ill|lt=Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni City)|Q111776816|qid=Q111776816|lt=Hirose Shrine|1=Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni)}} located in present-day {{ill|lt=Izunokuni City|Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}} ({{ill|lt=Ohito Town|Q8081497|qid=Q8081497|lt=Ohito|1=Ōhito, Shizuoka}})[https://shrineheritager.com/hirose-shrine/amp/ Hirose Shrine] - Shrine Heritager[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140210-02.html Hirose Shrine] - Research on Engishiki Shrines. The area where Rakujuen and Mishima Station now stand was formerly a shrine-and-temple precinct known as Kohamayama. Along with Aizen-in (now defunct) and {{ill|lt=Asama Shrine (Mishima City)|Q30925511|qid=Q30925511|lt=Asama Shrine|1=Sengen Shrine (Izu Province Ni-no-Miya)}} (the Sannomiya of Izu Province, later Nomiya), it was enshrined there as the Shinomiya of Izu Province, and it was formerly a {{ill|lt=subsidiary shrine|Q135009904|qid=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} of Mishima Taisha. Amid surrounding development after the {{ill|lt=Meiji period|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}}, including the construction of a Komatsunomiya imperial villa on the present site of Rakujuen in Meiji 23 ({{ill|lt=1890|Q7832|qid=Q7832|1=1890}}), the shrine was temporarily relocated to the adjacent precinct of Asama Shrine. Later, in Shōwa 27 ({{ill|lt=1952|Q5272|qid=Q5272|1=1952}}), when Rakujuen became a public park, the shrine was rebuilt within the park. === Enshrined deity === * Unknown === References === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hirose Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hirose Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Successor]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shi-no-Miya]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mishima, Shizuoka]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]
